name: The Collapsed
description: Boneless heap / limbs splayed at unnatural angles / chin on the floor / zero structural integrity / looks like they melted in place.

name: The Composed
description: Sitting upright with perfect posture / paws neatly together / chin slightly raised / dignified and proper / holding a formal pose.

name: The Unraveling
description: Slowly sliding down / one paw holding head up / other paw limp / gradual structural failure mid-pose / not yet collapsed but visibly failing.

name: The Direct Address
description: Facing forward / making eye contact with viewer / no angle, no pretense / confrontational or inviting, depending on expression.

name: The Almost Standing
description: Back legs fully extended / front legs barely supporting / rear higher than front / halfway between sitting and standing / looks like they gave up halfway up.

name: The Settled
description: Comfortably planted / weight evenly distributed / no tension in limbs / firmly occupying space / looks like they live there.

name: The Smug
description: Chin raised high / chest slightly puffed / one eyebrow up / leaning back slightly / maximally full of themselves.

name: The Terrified
description: Cowering low to ground / paws tucked in / ears flat / body angled away from viewer / trying to disappear.

name: The Proud
description: Chest out / chin high / standing tall / weight on back legs, front legs slightly off ground / triumphant stance.

name: The Delighted
description: Body wiggling or bouncing / weight shifting from paw to paw / tail up / whole body engaged / can't contain the joy.

name: The Disgusted
description: Head pulled back / nose wrinkled / body angled away / one paw up as if warding off / recoiling.

name: The Curious
description: Lean forward / head tilted / one paw hovering / weight on front legs / ready to investigate.

name: The Bored
description: Weight on one side / slight slouch / head drooping / one paw dangling / utterly uninterested in everything.

name: The Confused
description: Head tilted severely / one ear up one down / body slightly turned / weight uneven / trying to process something.

name: The Angry/Furious
description: Low to ground / weight on front legs / head lowered / shoulders hunched / ready to pounce or confront.

name: The Playful
description: Play bow position (front down, rear up) / tail high / weight on front paws / invited engagement.

name: The Guilty
description: Head down / eyes looking up / body curled small / paws tucked / trying to be invisible.

name: The Hopeful
description: Sitting up tall / paws lifted slightly off ground / ears perked / eyes wide / waiting expectantly.

name: The Resentful/Bitter
description: Sitting stiffly / arms crossed if possible / weight shifted away from viewer / looking sideways / cold posture.

name: The Suspicious
description: Body angled sideways / one eye toward viewer / head lowered / weight on back legs / ready to bolt or judge.
